subtitles.original: 壊すけどいいの？
subtitles.english: I'm going to break it, is that okay?

subtitles.original: 囚われ舞い散るの
subtitles.english: Trapped and fluttering away.

subtitles.original: デス デス デ デ デ デス
subtitles.english: Death, death, de-de-de-death!

subtitles.original: 夢の中で君と手を繋いでいるの
subtitles.english: In my dreams, I am holding hands with you,

subtitles.original: 何も知らないあの頃の二人のままで
subtitles.english: just like the two of us back then, knowing nothing.

subtitles.original: でも分かっているよ すぐに覚めてしまうと
subtitles.english: But I know it well, that I will wake up soon.

subtitles.original: それならばいっそ 君の手でそっと
subtitles.english: If that's the case, then rather, by your hand, softly...

subtitles.original: トドメを刺して
subtitles.english: deal the finishing blow.

subtitles.original: ほら 今 今 今
subtitles.english: Look, now, now, now!

subtitles.original: 奪いたい奪いたい奪いたいな 奇跡とかちょっと望んじゃって
subtitles.english: I want to steal, steal, steal it, hoping for a bit of a miracle,

subtitles.original: もう 嫌 嫌 嫌 嫌 嫌
subtitles.english: No more, no, no, no, no, no!

subtitles.original: タチが悪いわ
subtitles.english: This is so nasty.

subtitles.original: 足りない足りない足りないな おかしいとこ全部抉り取って
subtitles.english: It's not enough, not enough, gouge out all the strange parts,

subtitles.original: 拍手喝采で結構
subtitles.english: applause is perfectly fine.

subtitles.original: お好きに呼んでいいよ
subtitles.english: Call me whatever you like.

subtitles.original: 囚われる前に バイバイしたいの
subtitles.english: Before I get caught, I want to say bye-bye.

subtitles.original: デス デス デ デ デ デス
subtitles.english: Death, death, de-de-de-death,

subtitles.original: デス デス デ デ デ デス
subtitles.english: death, death, de-de-de-death!

subtitles.original: アイのシナリオ
subtitles.english: [Song: Ai no Scenario]

subtitles.original: 世界欺く揺るぎない正義
subtitles.english: An unwavering justice that deceives the world,

subtitles.original: ほどいて真実この手の中
subtitles.english: unravels, bringing the truth into these hands.

subtitles.original: 大胆不敵な影が華麗に踊る
subtitles.english: A daring, fearless shadow dances gracefully,

subtitles.original: 君が隠してる秘密いつか聞かせてよ
subtitles.english: tell me the secret you're hiding someday.

subtitles.original: 伸ばした手で触れる事は誰もできない
subtitles.english: No one can reach out and touch it,

subtitles.original: 君が隠してる世界僕に見せてよ
subtitles.english: show me the world you're hiding.

subtitles.original: 揺れる難解な心
subtitles.english: A wavering, complex heart,

subtitles.original: 解き明かして奪うその瞳
subtitles.english: solving the mystery, stealing away those eyes.

subtitles.original: 不安がって泣いてたって見つかんないよ
subtitles.english: Even if you cry in anxiety, you won't find it,

subtitles.original: 狙う真実はどこへ消えた
subtitles.english: where did the truth we're aiming for vanish to?

subtitles.original: たとえ
subtitles.english: Even if...

subtitles.original: 世界欺く解答（こたえ）だとしても
subtitles.english: even if it's an answer that deceives the world,

subtitles.original: 信じて差し出す掌
subtitles.english: I'll believe and hold out my palm.

subtitles.original: 決して逃げない怖くは無いから
subtitles.english: I'll never run away, because I'm not afraid,

subtitles.original: 目を開け弱さをかき消すんだ
subtitles.english: open your eyes and drown out the weakness!

subtitles.original: 繰り返される運命に君は気づいてる？
subtitles.english: Have you noticed the repeating fate?

subtitles.original: 僕が隠してる秘密いつか聞かせるよ
subtitles.english: I'll tell you the secret I'm hiding someday.

subtitles.original: 歩み寄る偽りの影君は知らない
subtitles.english: You don't know the false shadow approaching,

subtitles.original: 芽生えた記憶は絡む必然の棘で
subtitles.english: the budding memories are tangled in inevitable thorns.

subtitles.original: 守りたい想いでただ
subtitles.english: Simply with the desire to protect,

subtitles.original: 立ち向かって解（ほど）くその絆
subtitles.english: I'll stand tall and untie those bonds.

subtitles.original: 何度だって助けるって揺るぎはしないよ
subtitles.english: I will save you as many times as it takes, I won't waver,

subtitles.original: 隠す真実はどこへ消えた
subtitles.english: where did the hidden truth vanish to?

subtitles.original: たとえ
subtitles.english: Even if...

subtitles.original: 世界を敵に回したとしても
subtitles.english: even if I turn the whole world against me,

subtitles.original: 「信じて」僕だけ未来も
subtitles.english: believe in only me, and our future too,

subtitles.original: 決して逃げない迷いは無いから
subtitles.english: I'll never run away, because I have no doubts,

subtitles.original: シナリオ壊して抗うんだ
subtitles.english: I'll destroy the scenario and fight back!

responses.thoughts:
**Finalizing the Subtitle Transcription**

Alright, let's get this done. I've thoroughly analyzed the video, identified the songs ("ZIG-ZAG" followed by "Ai no Scenario"), and handled that critical initial mismatch in the reference JSON. Now, my focus is to create perfectly timed and accurate subtitles.

I've manually transcribed the lyrics, ensuring that they match the audio precisely, and made sure all timecodes are spot on. I’ve incorporated the title card for "Ai no Scenario" as a subtitle event. I've rechecked to make sure no CC tags or other unnecessary text are included, and checked that the translations are fluent. Timecodes and formatting look good, using MM:SS.mmm (e.g., 00:00.000). The translations are also short enough to be compliant with the character rules.

Everything is primed for the final output. I am ready to generate the tool call!
